lines.english: Bai Ying'ai, how many people are in your family?
There are six people in my family: my dad, my mom, an older brother, two younger sisters, and me. Li You, how many people are in your family?
There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?
My dad is a lawyer, and my mom is an English teacher. My older brother and younger sisters are all college students.
My mom is also a teacher, and my dad is a doctor.

example_sentence.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example_sentence.en: There are five people in my family.

example_sentence.py: Bái Yīng'ài nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén
example_sentence.en: Bai Ying'ai, how many people are in your family?

vocabulary.definition: (measure word for number of family members)

example_sentence.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example_sentence.en: There are five people in my family.

example_sentence.cn: 我家有六口人,我爸爸、我妈妈、一个哥哥、两个妹妹和我。李友,你家有几口人?
example_sentence.py: wǒ jiā yǒu liù kǒu rén wǒ bàba wǒ māma yí ge gēge liǎng ge mèimei hé wǒ Lǐ Yǒu nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén
example_sentence.en: There are six people in my family: my dad, my mom, an older brother, two younger sisters, and me. Li You, how many people are in your family?

example_sentence.py: Xiǎo Gāo jiā yǒu liǎng ge dàxuéshēng.
example_sentence.en: There are two college students in Little Gao's family.

example_sentence.cn: 王朋和白英爱都有妹妹。
example_sentence.py: Wáng Péng hé Bái Yīng'ài dōu yǒu mèimei.
example_sentence.en: Both Wang Peng and Bai Ying'ai have younger sisters.

example_sentence.cn: 王朋、李友和高文中都是学生。
example_sentence.py: Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu hé Gāo Wénzhōng dōu shì xuésheng.
example_sentence.en: Wang Peng, Li You, and Gao Wenzhong are all students.

example_sentence.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example_sentence.py: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén bàba māma dàjiě èrjiě hé wǒ nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò
example_sentence.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example_sentence.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example_sentence.py: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén bàba māma dàjiě èrjiě hé wǒ nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò
example_sentence.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example_sentence.cn: 他/她做什么工作? 你呢?
example_sentence.py: Tā zuò shénme gōngzuò? Nǐ ne?
example_sentence.en: What does he/she do? How about you?

example_sentence.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?

example_sentence.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example_sentence.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example_sentence.py: wǒ bàba shì lǜshī māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī gēge mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng
example_sentence.en: My dad is a lawyer, and my mom is an English teacher. My older brother and younger sisters are all college students.

example_sentence.en: My mom is also a teacher, and my dad is a doctor.

video_global_config.visual_style: 3D Pixar animation style, vibrant colors, soft and warm lighting, cinematic feel, suitable for educational content.

character_definitions.name: 李友
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A friendly young Chinese man in his early twenties, with short, neat black hair, warm brown eyes, and a gentle smile. He wears a casual blue hoodie and jeans.

character_definitions.name: 白英爱
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A cheerful young Chinese woman in her early twenties, with long black hair tied in a high ponytail, bright, expressive eyes. She wears a cozy yellow sweater.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 开场镜头。李友和白英爱坐在一个阳光明媚的大学咖啡馆里，隔着一张木桌相对而坐。李友微笑着向白英爱提问。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A young Chinese man (Li You) and a young Chinese woman (Bai Ying'ai) are sitting at a wooden table in a bright, sunlit university cafe. Li You leans forward with a friendly smile, asking a question. The background is softly blurred with other students and large windows. Medium shot, cinematic, warm lighting.

voice_over.content: 白英爱, 你家有几口人?
voice_over.pinyin: Bái Yīng'ài, nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?

screen_overlay.sub_text: nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén? (How many people are in your family?)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 白英爱回答问题。当她提到每个家庭成员时，他们可爱的3D卡通头像会依次出现在她身边。然后她反问李友。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Close-up on Bai Ying'ai's cheerful face. As she lists her family, cute, stylized 3D icons pop up around her: a kind father, a gentle mother, a cool older brother, and two identical younger sisters. She then looks inquisitively at Li You. Dynamic animation, warm and inviting light.

voice_over.content: 我家有六口人, 我爸爸、我妈妈、一个哥哥、两个妹妹和我。李友, 你家有几口人?
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu liù kǒu rén, wǒ bàba, wǒ māma, yí ge gēge, liǎng ge mèimei hé wǒ. Lǐ Yǒu, nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?

screen_overlay.main_text: 爸爸, 妈妈, 哥哥, 妹妹

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 镜头转向李友。他回答时，头顶出现一个思想泡泡，里面是他家人的全家福。然后他好奇地问白英爱父母的工作。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of Li You. A stylized thought bubble appears above his head, showing a warm family portrait of his father, mother, eldest sister, and second eldest sister. He smiles and then his expression becomes curious as he asks a new question. Soft, natural light, cafe background.

voice_over.content: 我家有五口人: 爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén: bàba, māma, dàjiě, èrjiě hé wǒ. Nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò?

screen_overlay.main_text: 大姐 (dàjiě), 二姐 (èrjiě), 做工作 (zuò gōngzuò)
screen_overlay.sub_text: Eldest Sister, Second Eldest Sister, to do work

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 场景切换为动画分屏。左边是白英爱的父亲（律师）在法庭上，右边是她的母亲（英文老师）在教室里。然后画面切换到她的哥哥和妹妹们在大学校园里。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style, dynamic split-screen animation. Left side: a confident Asian man in a lawyer's suit in a bright, stylized courtroom. Right side: a warm Asian woman writing 'English' on a chalkboard. The scene then merges into a full shot of three happy university students (one male, two female) on a beautiful campus. Vibrant, illustrative style.

voice_over.content: 我爸爸是律师, 妈妈是英文老师, 哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ bàba shì lǜshī, māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī, gēge, mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng.

screen_overlay.main_text: 律师 (lǜshī), 老师 (lǎoshī), 大学生 (dàxuéshēng)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 画面回到咖啡馆的李友。他旁边再次出现分屏，展示他的母亲（也是一位老师）和他的父亲（一位医生）。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. The scene returns to Li You in the cafe, smiling. A new split-screen appears beside him. Left side: a kind Asian woman, also a teacher, helping a student. Right side: a professional Asian man in a doctor's white coat with a stethoscope, smiling in a clean, modern clinic. Bright and reassuring lighting.

voice_over.content: 我妈妈也是老师, 我爸爸是医生。
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ māma yě shì lǎoshī, wǒ bàba shì yīshēng.
